acceptance_criteria: Document adapter mount proof: OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid renders through PowersheetGrid as the exclusive runtime path, no classic LineItemTable fallback exists inside the document grid component, and all document-owned behaviors pass through the shared adapter.

assertions.label: OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid renders through PowersheetGrid with surfaceId=orders-document-grid
assertions.expected: PowersheetGrid mock receives surfaceId='orders-document-grid', selectionMode='cell-range', enableFillHandle=true, enableUndoRedo=true.
assertions.observed: Unit test: arms the document grid with spreadsheet runtime behaviors and row actions. Verifies all props passed to PowersheetGrid.

assertions.label: OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid contains no classic LineItemTable rendering path
assertions.expected: The component imports PowersheetGrid and renders exclusively through it. No import of LineItemTable exists in the component file.
assertions.observed: Source inspection: OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid.tsx imports PowersheetGrid at line 18 and renders it at line 1195+. No LineItemTable import or rendering exists. The classic/sheet-native conditional is in OrderCreatorPage.tsx:1692, not in the grid component.

assertions.label: Duplicate, delete, and add-item row operations pass through the shared adapter
assertions.expected: Row operations (duplicate, delete, add) render as header actions in PowersheetGrid and call onChange/onAddItem without bypassing the adapter.
assertions.observed: Unit test: duplicates and deletes selected rows through the shared row operations. Unit test: fills price, clears samples, and delegates add-item insertion without replacing orchestration.

assertions.label: Page-level keyboard handlers are bypassed when focus is inside the document spreadsheet runtime
assertions.expected: shouldBypassWorkSurfaceKeyboardForSpreadsheetTarget returns true when target is inside [data-powersheet-surface-id='orders-document-grid'].
assertions.observed: Unit test: bypasses page-level keyboard handlers when focus is inside the document spreadsheet runtime (OrderCreatorPage.pricing.test.ts).

assertions.label: Fill handle operations pass through the document adapter with validation
assertions.expected: fillHandleOptions.setFillValue uses deterministic vertical fill. onFillStart/onFillEnd handle snapshot and writeback. Invalid fill values revert.
assertions.observed: Unit tests: uses a deterministic vertical fill callback for approved document fields; persists fill-handle edits back into document state on fill end; reverts fill-end when a filled value fails field validation.

assertions.label: Selection set and summary are tracked through the adapter
assertions.expected: onSelectionSetChange and onSelectionSummaryChange callbacks update adapter state. Selection-dependent behaviors (suppressCut, fill price) respond to selection changes.
assertions.observed: Unit tests: uses the focused row id instead of display index when filling prices; suppresses cut shortcuts when the current selection includes locked document columns.

SALE-ORD-003.evidence: PowersheetGrid mount with exclusive rendering path, no classic fallback in component. Conditional mount lives in OrderCreatorPage.tsx:1692 via inSheetNativeOrdersSurface flag.
SALE-ORD-003.residual: Live staging proof deferred — no fresh staging build available.

SALE-ORD-004.evidence: Recalculation through adapter (quantity, cogsPerUnit, marginPercent, unitPrice edit tests), fill-handle writeback, and keyboard bypass all proven via unit tests.
SALE-ORD-004.residual: Live draft edit + autosave round-trip requires staging proof.

SALE-ORD-006.evidence: Row duplicate and delete operations proven via unit tests. Queue return behavior is in OrderCreatorPage (page-level routing), not adapter-level.
SALE-ORD-006.residual: Live reopen/delete/queue-return flow requires staging proof.

SALE-ORD-015.evidence: Delete row operation proven via unit test (duplicates and deletes selected rows). Queue-level draft delete is handled by OrdersSheetPilotSurface, not the document adapter.
SALE-ORD-015.residual: None — queue draft delete is G1/G4 scope.
